name: ui-color-palette
description: Design color palettes, audit contrast, generate code, and sync to Figma, Penpot, Sketch, and Framer — powered by the UI Color Palette API

penpot_token.title: Penpot user token
penpot_token.description: Your Penpot user token. Find it in Penpot → Account → Integrations → MCP Server.

framer_mcp_url.title: Framer MCP URL
framer_mcp_url.description: Your Framer MCP URL from the Framer marketplace plugin.

gitlab_url.title: GitLab instance URL
gitlab_url.description: Your GitLab instance URL (e.g. https://gitlab.company.com). Leave empty if not using GitLab.
